flagged.detail: The Extra-field Khan Academy link has a malformed href whose value begins with a stray " entity, producing a broken URL (cloze studying itself is unaffected).
The cloze deletion is an embedded image rather than text, so the revealed answer adds no readable text beyond the question stem (image-only cloze; studyable only via the diagram).

notes: This MileDown Behavioral/Biochemistry batch is very high quality: all 257 cloze cards have non-empty, readable question/answer text, balanced {{c1::...}} clozes, and deletions that correctly fill their blanks; no LaTeX/MathJax is used and no unrendered template artifacts were found. Only two minor issues exist: one Extra-field link with a malformed href (stray " entity) and one image-only cloze (Metabolic Pathways Overview) whose answer is a diagram with no text. A handful of other Extra-field links contain harmless double-encoded ampersands (&amp), which do not affect studying.
